brief: Extend existing brix.time Int-second helpers. Add total pure conversions: `fn hours(n: Int) -> Int = n * 3600`, `fn minutes(n: Int) -> Int = n * 60`, `fn from_hours(seconds: Int) -> Int = seconds / 3600`, `fn from_minutes(seconds: Int) -> Int = seconds / 60`, `fn clamp_instant(t: Int, lo: Int, hi: Int) -> Int = if t < lo then lo else if t > hi then hi else t`. Exact `fn`/`=` syntax. Preserve existing decls. No type aliases Instant/Duration (they mismatch today). Host formats after check.
